results.title: CentryAI Product Hunt
results.content: Most trackers make you enter everything manually — that doesn't work if you've forgotten what you're paying for. The real pain is cancelling. Detective work of tracking them down and mental load of cancelling kept getting postponed.

results.title: Best subscription tracking app
results.content: Users tired of every utility app being a subscription. Ongoing developer hours cost money which justifies subscription price.
